untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'fundamental catalyst publicly announced' and 'trader feels uncomfortable with ambiguity' — these are sentiment/external event conditions that cannot be expressed using price/volume technical indicators alone. The breakout confirmation (1-2 days holding above/below level) is approximated using Donchian breakout with volume confirmation, but the fundamental trigger and psychological state are external to the indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated breakout logic using Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as proxy for resistance/support levels. Used volume > historical volatility as confirmation. Entry requires both breakout AND elevated volume. Exit triggers on pivot penetration with volume spike (indicating thesis disproof or trend reversal). Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal specification. Cannot model the fundamental catalyst requirement without external event data.
